heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 5355 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated the following amounts for the following fiscal years to carry out the purposes of this subchapter:For fiscal year:The amount authorized is:1999$5,000,000.2000$7,500,000.2001$10,000,000.2002$12,500,000.2003$15,000,000.2004$15,000,000.2005$15,000,000.
notes: Amendments2004— in table inserted items specifying amounts authorized for fiscal years 2004 and 2005.Pub. L. 108–458
amendments: Amendments2004— in table inserted items specifying amounts authorized for fiscal years 2004 and 2005.Pub. L. 108–458
